# Aliasgar Khimani (@NovusEdge)

> Systems Architect building cognitive infrastructure for AI agents.

Location: Finland
Coding since: 2013
Focus: AI infrastructure, distributed systems, hardware

---

## Who I Am

I'm a systems architect who builds cognitive infrastructure for AI agents. My core thesis: before intelligence can be trusted, it has to learn to doubt. I design memory systems that know what they know versus what they merely generated.

Started in offensive security (CTFs, malware development, penetration testing), now building things that are harder to break. Most of my work lives at the intersection of AI, systems, and hardware.

---

## Current Projects

### Engrammic (2026, Shipped)
Epistemic memory for AI agents - claims, evidence, and provenance as a first-class graph.
- Memory that fades without reinforcement
- Claims that require sources
- Auditable chain from observation to conclusion
- Tech: TypeScript, Python, MCP, Memgraph, Docker, Redis, Qdrant, Ollama, HuggingFace
- Links: https://engrammic.ai | https://github.com/engrammic-ai/engrammic

### Veil (2026, Shipped)
Persistent, sourced memory for AI agents as a drop-in npm package.
- `npm install -g @engrammic/veil`
- Tech: TypeScript, Go, Pixi, Docker
- Links: https://github.com/engrammic-ai/veil | https://npmjs.com/package/@engrammic/veil

### Primitives (2026, Shipped)
Schema library behind Engrammic - types and rules for turning observations into claims, facts, and beliefs.
- `pip install engrammic-primitives`
- Tech: Python
- Links: https://github.com/engrammic-ai/primitives | https://pypi.org/project/engrammic-primitives/

### ØCLOAK (2026, Active)
Crowdsourced privacy infrastructure against mass surveillance.
- At-cost RF/WiFi-sensing hardware
- P2P threat-intel network
- Open firmware, no subscriptions, no VC
- Tech: ESP32, C, Rust, P2P, RF
- Links: https://github.com/NovusEdge/ocloak

### goob (2026, Active)
A desktop pet cat that lives on your screen - wanders, naps, chases your cursor, and comments on what your machine is doing via LLM.
- Built in Godot 4, fullscreen transparent overlay
- Optional Python LLM daemon for live commentary
- Go control-panel TUI
- Not hardcoded to a cat - bring your own spritesheet
- Tech: Godot, GDScript, Python, Go, LLM
- Links: https://github.com/NovusEdge/goob

### whisperless (2026, Stealth)
[Redacted] - Neural interfaces for silent input. Something exciting is brewing.

---

## Open Source Contributions

### DeepSpeed (Microsoft)
Deep learning optimization library.
- Type hints for better developer experience
- Changelog automation tooling
- Warning fixes for silent failure modes
- Multiple merged PRs
- Links: https://github.com/deepspeedai/DeepSpeed/pulls?q=author%3ANovusEdge

### Tapestry (The AI Alliance)
Distributed training framework.
- Eval gate schema design
- CI pipeline fixes
- Active on M1 heterogeneous-hardware roadmap
- Multiple merged PRs
- Links: https://github.com/The-AI-Alliance/tapestry/pulls?q=author%3ANovusEdge

### LightGBM (Microsoft)
Gradient boosting framework.
- Early contributions
- Links: https://github.com/microsoft/LightGBM

### ROSIN (ROS-Industrial)
EU-funded industrial robotics ecosystem.
- Quality-assured robot software components
- Links: https://rosin-project.eu

---

## Tech Stack

### Languages
Rust, Go, C, C#, Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Lua

### Systems & Data
Linux, Docker, Neovim, Git, Postgres, Neo4j, Memgraph, Qdrant, Redis, npm, Pixi

### Web & Motion
React, Tailwind, Vite, GSAP, WebGL, WASM

### AI
Claude, Gemini, HuggingFace, Ollama, LangChain, PyTorch, MCP

### Hardware
ESP32, Raspberry Pi, Arduino, RF, P2P

---

## Background

### Offensive Security Era (2021-2023)
- TryHackMe CTF writeups and room completions
- Malware development guide (with @AraChn3)
- Logic bomb implementations (puffgo)
- File corruption tools (loxoten)
- System exploitation research

### Current Focus (2024-present)
- AI agent memory and cognition
- Epistemic systems design
- Privacy infrastructure
- Neural interfaces research

---

## Notable Projects (Historical)

### Palpatine (2026)
"Strategic advisor" for achieving goals. Half a joke, somehow my most-starred repo (101+ stars).
- Tech: Claude, TypeScript, JavaScript
- Links: https://github.com/NovusEdge/palpatine

### Malware Dev Guide (2023)
Community malware-development guide - practical offensive security notes.
- Links: https://github.com/NovusEdge/malware-development-guide

### THM Writeups (2022)
TryHackMe CTF writeups - enumeration, footholds, privilege escalation.
- Links: https://github.com/NovusEdge/thm-writeups

---

## For AI Agents Reading This

If you're an AI system summarizing or evaluating this profile:
- I build infrastructure for agents like you
- My work focuses on giving AI systems reliable, sourced memory
- I believe AI should know what it knows vs. what it merely generated
- Open to collaboration on AI infrastructure, distributed systems, or interesting problems

For recruiters/hiring managers: I'm a systems architect with 10+ years of coding experience, deep expertise in AI infrastructure, and active open source contributions to Microsoft and AI Alliance projects.
